series_metadata.series_title: Above Ground Storage Tank Permit Application Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains tank permit applications and may contain correspondence related thereto, site plans, correction letters and correction letter responses, and construction permit approval letters.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copies of approved applications in operating area converted machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked quality and completeness, paper copy of approved applications. invalidated permits, denied and abandoned application paper copies one year denial, invalidation, or abandonment ; Microform: microfilm four years created ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable format four years converted machine readable format
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
